question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the main sections of the thesis.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is somewhat implied through the discussion of the problem and its relevance, but it is not clearly outlined. The text could benefit from a more explicit description of how the thesis will be organized.
